stemHtml: During the cruise, smoke emerges on the flight deck. The source of the smoke is obvious and identified to be in the flight deck. The flight crew should next…

options.a: divert to the nearest suitable airport at maximum speed, only taking additional actions if a fire develops.
options.b: instruct the cabin crew to wear Protective Breathing Equipment and enter the flight deck with a water solution (H2O) extinguisher.
options.c: isolate the source of the smoke, by removing power from the affected equipment by switch or circuit breaker.
options.d: continue the flight to the original destination if the remaining flight time is less than 90 minutes.
